title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Zoom in/out toggle on charge case inside screen in QSG when clicking left circle button on fourth screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Locate and tap the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
Swipe to the fourth screen showing the charge case inside view.
Tap the left circle button on the screen.
Tap the same left circle button again.
expected: Tapping the left circle button should zoom in on the charge case inside view with new text appearing. Tapping the circle button again should zoom out to the original screen showing the charge case inside.
